aiChat.title: Meeting AI
aiChat.subtitle: Meeting context loaded
aiChat.welcomeTitle: Hi! I know everything about this meeting.
aiChat.welcomeSubtitle: Ask about the transcript, action items, or decisions — or pick one of the options below.

settings.devModeDescription: Enable experimental glass effects and developer tools.
settings.profileImageDescription: This image appears in your profile, comments, and shared recordings.
settings.yourNameDescription: Changing your name below will update how your name appears when sharing a recording, and in your profile.
settings.contactEmailDescription: This is the email address you used to sign up to data365 with.
settings.defaultOrgDescription: This is the organization you're taken to when you sign in.
settings.notificationDescription: Choose which activity triggers a notification for you.
settings.signOutAllDevicesDescription: Invalidate every web session and desktop app authentication token connected to your account.
settings.signOutAllDevicesError: Failed to sign out of all devices
settings.signOutAllDevicesDialogDescription: This will immediately invalidate existing web sessions, desktop session tokens, and desktop API keys for your account.
settings.signOutAllDevicesDialogBody1: You will be signed out of this browser after the reset completes.
settings.signOutAllDevicesDialogBody2: The desktop app may need you to click Sign out, then sign in again before uploads and settings sync work.
settings.dangerZoneDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountSubtext: Once deleted, your account cannot be recovered.
settings.deleteAccountDialogDescription: Type your email address ({email}) to confirm deletion. This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountError: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

generateAi.confirmBody: This uses your AI budget (Gemini). It usually costs a few cents; long videos cost more. Continue?

auth.signinSubtitle: Record lessons and share them instantly.
auth.signupSubtitle: Create your account to start watching lessons.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.errorMinChars: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.termsNoticeSignin: By signing in, you acknowledge that you have both read and agree to data365's <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
auth.termsNoticeSignup: By creating an account, you acknowledge that you have both read and agree to data365's <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

recorder.cameraError: Unable to access your camera. Check browser permissions.
recorder.micError: Unable to access your microphone. Check browser permissions.
recorder.howItWorksUploadsDesc: On compatible browsers, your capture uploads in the background while you record. Otherwise, it records first and uploads right after you stop.
recorder.howItWorksLinkDesc: Stopping the recording finalizes the upload immediately so you can copy your link right away.
recorder.howItWorksWebcamDesc: On compatible browsers, selecting a camera opens a picture‑in‑picture window that's captured when you record fullscreen. We recommend fullscreen to keep it on top. If PiP capture isn't supported, your camera is limited to the recorder page.
recorder.fullscreenPipHint: Recommended to capture camera window when picture in picture is activated
recorder.rememberDevicesDesc: If available, the last used camera and mic will be automatically selected.
recorder.systemAudioHintFullscreen: Make sure to check "Share system audio" in the browser picker.
recorder.systemAudioHintWindow: System audio may not be available when sharing a window.
recorder.noAudioWarning: No audio selected — this recording will be silent and AI analysis won't run. Turn on your microphone or system audio.
recorder.silentRecordingWarning: No audio selected — this recording will be silent and AI transcription won't run. Click Record again to record without audio.
recorder.browserNotSupported: This browser isn't compatible with data365's web recorder. We recommend Google Chrome or other Chromium-based browsers.
recorder.keepDialogOpen: Keep this dialog open while your upload finishes.
recorder.linkNotOpened: If it did not open automatically, open it here.

share.videoTitleUpdateFailed: Failed to update title - please try again.
share.freePlanLimitNotice: Shareable links are limited to 5 mins on the free plan.
share.authCodeSentToEmail: We sent a 6-digit code to your email.
share.authOr: OR
share.authTermsNotice: By entering your email, you acknowledge that you have both read and agree to data365's <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
share.otpErrorOccurred: An error occurred. Please try again.
share.otpNewCodeSent: A new code has been sent to your email!
share.otpWaitSeconds: Please wait {seconds} seconds before requesting a new code
share.otpWait30Seconds: Please wait 30 seconds before requesting a new code
share.passwordProtectedDesc: This video is password protected. Please enter the password to continue watching.
share.rawTranscriptUnavailable: Raw transcript is not available for this recording.
share.cleanTranscriptReady: A cleaned transcript is ready. Open the Clean Transcript tab to read the full AI-polished version.
share.markCompletedAriaLabel: Why this recording needs to be marked as completed
share.markCompletedTooltip: We didn't receive confirmation that this recording finished uploading. Mark it as completed to publish what's been uploaded. Next time, keep the desktop app open after you stop recording until the video loads here, so all files finish uploading.
share.aiWelcomeTitle: Hi! I know <emphasis>everything</emphasis> about this video.
share.aiWelcomeSubtitle: Ask me anything — or pick one below.
share.aiError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
share.videoLoadError: Could not load a playable video source. Reload to try again.
share.originalUploadDesc: The processed version is unavailable right now, so this page is playing the original uploaded file instead.
share.optimizingVideoDesc: This page is temporarily playing the original uploaded file while data365 finishes processing the optimized version for smoother playback and broader compatibility.
share.pendingTimedOut: This recording is taking longer than expected. Reload this page in a moment.
share.pendingWaiting: Your recording is being made available. This page will update automatically.
share.recordingInProgressDesc: This video is still being recorded and will be available once the recording has stopped.
share.transcriptProcessing: Transcript will appear here once processing is complete
share.refinedTranscriptDesc: Summary and transcript can still be used without this optional cleaned version
share.commentsDisabledDesc: Comments are disabled for this video
share.beFirstToShare: Be the first to share your thoughts!
share.deleteCommentConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?
share.aiTranscriptReadyIdle: Transcript ready. Start AI analysis when you need it.
share.aiNoticeLong: Long video: transcription runs in smaller chunks, and AI analysis can take longer. It only starts after you click.
share.aiNoticeMedium: Longer video: AI analysis may take extra time and budget. It only starts after you click.
share.aiNotRunYet: AI analysis has not been run for this video yet.

nav.createOrgDescription: A new organization to share recordings with your team
